questions.assertion: Assertion (A): A stack is a linear data structure that follows the Last-In-First-Out (LIFO) principle.
questions.reason: Reason (R): This principle means that the last element added to the stack is the first one to be removed.

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
